recommendations.title: The Bet
recommendations.overview: Two rival "brothers-in-law" make a bet that they can stop smoking for 2 weeks. But, it's just not that easy...

recommendations.title: The Three Kings
recommendations.overview: The Three Wise Men – Balthazar, Melchior and Gaspard – are on their way to Bethlehem to pay homage to the infant Jesus when they are suddenly, an inexplicably, transported two thousand years into the future. They find themselves walking the streets o

recommendations.title: The Three Brothers: The Return
recommendations.overview: Three brothers are reunited on the occasion of the death of his mother. The three are in a difficult stage of their lives due to economic difficulties: Bernard is a failed actor, Didier pretends to be a professor of philosophy when, in fact, is selli
recommendations.director: Pascal Légitimus, Bernard Campan, Didier Bourdon

recommendations.title: Beautiful Minds
recommendations.overview: Two men, with vastly different life stories and personalities, embark on a hearse heading to the South of France. During their journey they realize that, however unlikely, they're not so different in the end.

recommendations.title: Seven Years of Marriage
recommendations.overview: After seven years of marriage, a couple of professional workers (he, a doctor and she, a banker) try to refresh their sex life.

recommendations.title: The Kid
recommendations.overview: A tramp cares for a boy after he's abandoned as a newborn by his mother. Later the mother has a change of heart and aches to be reunited with her son.

recommendations.title: Madame Irma
recommendations.overview: Francis, who is in his forties, manages the French subsidiary of an American high-tech company. But the shareholders suddenly decide to close it. Depressed by the idea of being unemployed and the prospect of losing his second wife, Francis decides to

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.

recommendations.title: C'è tempo
recommendations.overview: After the death of his estranged father, professional rainbow-watcher Stefano finds out he has a 13-year-old half-brother, and that he must become his legal guardian to receive the inheritance.

recommendations.title: Pride
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a group of LGBT activists decide to raise money to support the National Union of Mineworkers during their lengthy strike. There is only one problem: the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.
